title: bidens woodii
intro: Bidens woodii, also known as the "Mother's Tongue" or "Wild Beggartick", is a perennial herb belonging to the Bidens genus, native to South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bidens woodii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Bidens woodii is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
